text: I feel a subtle awareness of being inside an institution dedicated to learning and innovation. The glass walls and organized interior create a sense of transparency, but also distance. Moving into the exhibition area, the words about reflection, inclusion, and growth around me spark introspection. The blending of sterile architecture with hopeful, creative themes makes me ponder how environments influence thought and change. There is a gentle optimism here, yet a reminder of the ever-present boundaries institutions impose.
